chain.thought: Explanation: "Did something" refers to years they made the playoffs (had a qualifier). They qualified in 2001, 2002, 2003, 2004, 2006, 2007, and 2008, totaling 7 years.

judge_thought: Explanation: The question appears to ask how many years they made the playoffs (i.e., “did something” in the playoffs column). Counting years where the playoffs entry is not “did not make playoffs”: 2001 (3rd qualifier), 2002 (2nd qualifier), 2003 (2nd qualifier), 2004 (2nd qualifier), 2006 (4th qualifier), 2007 (1st qualifier), 2008 (2nd qualifier). That totals 7 years.
